name: devdocket-github
description: GitHub provider for DevDocket — discovers assigned issues, PR reviews, and authored PRs with status tracking.

devDocketGithub.repos.description:
Filter which repositories appear in DevDocket. Uses gitignore-style patterns, one per line. By default, all repositories are shown. When patterns are specified, only matching repositories are included.

Examples:
myorg/*           # include all repos in myorg
!myorg/archived-*  # exclude archived repos
other/specific-repo # include one specific repo

Supports wildcards (*), exclusions (!), and comments (#).
Leave empty to show all repositories.

devDocketGithub.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: How often to refresh GitHub issues (in seconds). Minimum 60 seconds. Values below 60 are clamped.

devDocketGithub.resurfaceOnNewVersion.description: Resurface PR reviews when new commits are pushed.

devDocketGithub.resurfaceOnReRequestedRe.description: Resurface PR reviews when review is explicitly re-requested.
